noticia.titulo: “Shiver: Slaying All Night” Wraps Principal Photography, Enters Post-Production
noticia.texto_resumido: The highly anticipated winter slasher film Shiver: Slaying All Night has officially wrapped principal photography and is now moving into the post-production phase. After an intense and dedicated shoot, the cast and crew have completed filming, marking a major milestone for the chilling holiday horror project.
